narrative:
Precinct Lake (precinct in Logan County) has 469 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.8 percentage points.
